title: Breathing space

steps.title: Settle
steps.body: Sit or stand in a way that feels supported. If breathwork feels uncomfortable, stop and use grounding instead.

steps.title: Two-minute rhythm
steps.body: Breathe in for four, pause gently, breathe out for six.

steps.title: What changed?
steps.body: Name one change in your body or attention.

completionPrompt: The goal is not perfect calm. It is giving your body a steadier signal.
